allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const c = fs.readFileSync\(''commands/ezra/init.md'',''utf8''\); console.log\(''First 100 chars repr:'', JSON.stringify\(c.slice\(0,100\)\)\); console.log\(''Has CRLF:'', c.includes\(''\\r\\n''\)\); console.log\(''Starts with ---:'', c.startsWith\(''---''\)\); const m = c.match\(/^---\\r?\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\r?\\n---/\); console.log\(''Regex match:'', !!m\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const c = fs.readFileSync\(''commands/ezra/init.md'',''utf8''\); console.log\(''Has CRLF:'', c.includes\(String.fromCharCode\(13,10\)\)\); console.log\(''Starts with ---:'', c.startsWith\(''---''\)\); const m = c.match\(/^---\\r?\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\r?\\n---/\); console.log\(''Regex match:'', m !== null\);")
